themeWords.meaning: to bless, to endue with power for success and prosperity

sentenceTheme: The LORD calls Abram to leave his homeland with promises of blessing and land; Abram journeys to Canaan, builds altars to the LORD, and later goes to Egypt where Sarai is taken by Pharaoh and then restored.

verses.text: Now the LORD had said unto Abram, Get thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and from thy father's house, unto a land that I will shew thee:

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD
land, earth, territory, country

verses.text: And I will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee, and make thy name great; and thou shalt be a blessing:

highlightedWords.meaning: nation, people, a non-Israelite nation; also used of Israel
to bless, to endue with power for success and prosperity

verses.text: And I will bless them that bless thee, and curse him that curseth thee: and in thee shall all families of the earth be blessed.

highlightedWords.meaning: to bless, to endue with power for success and prosperity
family, clan, extended family group

verses.text: So Abram departed, as the LORD had spoken unto him; and Lot went with him: and Abram was seventy and five years old when he departed out of Haran.

highlightedWords.meaning: Abram, exalted father; the first name of Abraham
the personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD

verses.text: And Abram took Sarai his wife, and Lot his brother's son, and all their substance that they had gathered, and the souls that they had gotten in Haran; and they went forth to go into the land of Canaan; and into the land of Canaan they came.

highlightedWords.meaning: Sarai, princess; later renamed Sarah
Canaan; the land west of the Jordan and its inhabitants

verses.text: And Abram passed through the land unto the place of Sichem, unto the plain of Moreh. And the Canaanite was then in the land.

highlightedWords.meaning: Shechem (Sichem), a city in central Canaan
Moreh; a place by a notable tree or oak

verses.text: And the LORD appeared unto Abram, and said, Unto thy seed will I give this land: and there builded he an altar unto the LORD, who appeared unto him.

highlightedWords.meaning: seed, offspring, descendants
altar, a place of sacrifice

verses.text: And he removed from thence unto a mountain on the east of Bethel, and pitched his tent, having Bethel on the west, and Hai on the east: and there he builded an altar unto the LORD, and called upon the name of the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: Bethel, house of God; a town north of Jerusalem
the personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD

verses.text: And Abram journeyed, going on still toward the south.

highlightedWords.meaning: Abram, exalted father; the first name of Abraham
south, Negev region

verses.text: And there was a famine in the land: and Abram went down into Egypt to sojourn there; for the famine was grievous in the land.

highlightedWords.meaning: famine, hunger
Egypt, a country in northeast Africa

verses.text: And it came to pass, when he was come near to enter into Egypt, that he said unto Sarai his wife, Behold now, I know that thou art a fair woman to look upon:

highlightedWords.meaning: Sarai, princess; later renamed Sarah
woman, wife, female

verses.text: Therefore it shall come to pass, when the Egyptians shall see thee, that they shall say, This is his wife: and they will kill me, but they will save thee alive.

highlightedWords.meaning: to say, speak, declare
woman, wife, female

verses.text: Say, I pray thee, thou art my sister: that it may be well with me for thy sake; and my soul shall live because of thee.

highlightedWords.meaning: sister, female relative
soul, life, self, person

verses.text: And it came to pass, that, when Abram was come into Egypt, the Egyptians beheld the woman that she was very fair.

highlightedWords.meaning: Egypt, a country in northeast Africa
beautiful, fair, pleasant

verses.text: The princes also of Pharaoh saw her, and commended her before Pharaoh: and the woman was taken into Pharaoh's house.

highlightedWords.meaning: Pharaoh, title of the kings of Egypt
house, household, dwelling

verses.text: And he entreated Abram well for her sake: and he had sheep, and oxen, and he asses, and menservants, and maidservants, and she asses, and camels.

highlightedWords.meaning: small livestock, sheep and goats, flock
camel

verses.text: And the LORD plagued Pharaoh and his house with great plagues because of Sarai Abram's wife.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel, the LORD
Pharaoh, title of the kings of Egypt

verses.text: And Pharaoh called Abram and said, What is this that thou hast done unto me? why didst thou not tell me that she was thy wife?

highlightedWords.meaning: Pharaoh, title of the kings of Egypt
woman, wife, female

verses.text: Why saidst thou, She is my sister? so I might have taken her to me to wife: now therefore behold thy wife, take her, and go thy way.

highlightedWords.meaning: sister, female relative
woman, wife, female

verses.text: And Pharaoh commanded his men concerning him: and they sent him away, and his wife, and all that he had.

highlightedWords.meaning: Pharaoh, title of the kings of Egypt
woman, wife, female
